javadoc_before:
/** * Reads bytes from an input stream. *

* This implementation guarantees that it will read as many bytes * as possible before giving up; this may not always be the case for * subclasses of {@link InputStream}. *

* * @param input where to read input. * @param buffer destination. * @param offset initial offset into buffer. * @param length length to read, must be >= 0. * @return actual length read; may be less than requested if EOF was reached. * @throws IllegalArgumentException if length is negative. * @throws IOException if a read error occurs. * @since 2.2 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Reads bytes from an input stream. *

* This implementation guarantees that it will read as many bytes * as possible before giving up; this may not always be the case for * subclasses of {@link InputStream}. *

* * @param input where to read input. * @param buffer destination. * @param offset initial offset into buffer. * @param length length to read, must be >= 0. * @return actual length read; may be less than requested if EOF was reached. * @throws NullPointerException if {@code input} or {@code buffer} is null. * @throws IndexOutOfBoundsException if {@code offset} or {@code length} is negative, or if * {@code offset + length} is greater than {@code buffer.length}. * @throws IOException if a read error occurs. * @since 2.2 */
